title: PayPal vs Crypto for Integrating NOWPayments Into a Digital Goods Store — An Honest Comparison
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Getting paid for your digital work should not depend on which country you were born in. Here is how creators everywhere collect real income.

content.text: Having a great digital product and being unable to collect payment is a frustrating experience that many creators in restricted countries know all too well. With platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often unavailable or unreliable, it can be tough to get paid for your work. This is where alternative payment solutions like crypto come in, offering a way to receive international payments without the need for a traditional bank account. But how do these solutions stack up against the traditional platforms, and what are the benefits of using crypto for your digital goods store?
What You Are Actually Comparing

When comparing PayPal to crypto for integrating NOWPayments into a digital goods store, it's essential to consider the underlying infrastructure and how it affects your ability to get paid. Traditional platforms like PayPal often come with restrictions, such as hold periods and withdrawal limits, that can make it difficult to access your funds. On the other hand, crypto-native infrastructure is designed to be more open and accessible, with faster payment confirmation times and no hold periods.
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often break down for creators in restricted countries due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. This can result in missed sales, delayed payments, and a lack of control over your finances. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure is designed to be more flexible and adaptable, allowing creators to receive payments from anywhere in the world without the need for a traditional bank account.
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, such as the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect, is designed to provide a more seamless and automated payment experience for digital creators. With instant automated delivery, no KYC requirements, and support for over 300 coins, including USDT on Tron, BTC, SOL, and ETH, creators can focus on what they do best: creating great digital products. Additionally, the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management, giving creators more control over their finances.

Using crypto-native infrastructure can be a liberating experience for digital creators who have been blocked by traditional platforms, allowing them to focus on creating great digital products and getting paid for their work.
The Real Cost Difference

One of the most significant advantages of using crypto-native infrastructure is the cost difference. With traditional platforms, creators often face high fees, hold periods, and withdrawal limits, which can eat into their profits. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure offers a more cost-effective solution, with lower fees and no hold periods, allowing creators to keep more of their hard-earned money. Furthermore, the Full Stack Bundle provides priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide, giving creators the tools they need to succeed.
Which One to Use and Why

For digital creators in restricted countries, using crypto-native infrastructure is often the best option. With its flexibility, adaptability, and cost-effectiveness, crypto-native infrastructure provides a more reliable and efficient way to receive international payments. By using the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, creators can focus on creating great digital products and getting paid for their work, without the hassle and restrictions of traditional platforms.
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

Receiving international payments without a bank account is now possible with crypto-native infrastructure, and converting USDT to local currency in Nigeria or Ghana can be done easily through various exchange platforms. The confirmation time for crypto payments is typically much faster than traditional platforms, with most payments being confirmed within a few minutes. Additionally, with crypto-native infrastructure, there are no hold periods, and creators can access their funds as soon as the payment is confirmed, giving them more control over their finances and allowing them to focus on creating great digital products.
Crypto payment infrastructure provides a level of platform independence that traditional platforms simply cannot match, giving creators more control over their finances and their business.
Related Topics Worth Reading

For digital creators who sell ebooks, courses, tutorials, art, music, software, fonts, presets, templates, and other digital products, using crypto-native infrastructure can be a game-changer.
